children.label: A
children.text: Adopt a seal which shall be judicially noticed;1So in original. Probably should not be capitalized.1

children.label: B
children.text: implement all terms of its charter;

children.label: C
children.text: prepare and submit to the Secretary, for review and approval under , a marketing and promotion plan and amendments to such plan which contain descriptions of the projected consumer education, research, and other marketing and promotion activities of the council;section 4011(a)(1) of this title

children.label: D
children.text: implement and administer an approved marketing and promotion plan and amendments to such plan;

children.label: E
children.text: determine the assessments to be made under and administer the collection of such assessments to finance council expenses described in paragraph (2) of this subsection;section 4012 of this title

children.label: F
children.text: receive, investigate and report to the Secretary accounts of violations of rules or orders relating to assessments collected under , or quality standard requirements established under subsection (c) of this section;section 4012 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: all administrative and contractual expenses;

children.label: ii
children.text: the probable costs of consumer education, research, and other marketing and promotion plans or projects;

children.label: iii
children.text: the costs of the collection of assessments; and

children.label: iv
children.text: the expense of repayment of the costs of each referendum conducted in regard to the council;

children.label: H
children.text: maintain books and records, prepare and submit to the Secretary such reports from time to time as may be necessary for appropriate accounting with respect to the receipt and disbursement of funds entrusted to it, and cause a complete audit report to be submitted to the Secretary at the end of each fiscal year;

children.label: I
children.text: reimburse the Secretary for the expenses incurred for the conduct of the referendum to establish the council or any subsequent referendum to terminate the council that fails; and

children.label: J
children.text: prepare and submit to the Secretary from time to time such reports or proposals as the council determines appropriate to further the purposes of this chapter.

children.label: A
children.text: research, consumer education, and other marketing and promotion activities regarding the quality and marketing of fish and fish products;

children.label: B
children.text: other expenses, as described in subsection (a)(1)(G) of this section;

children.label: C
children.text: such other expenses for the administration, maintenance, and functioning of the council as may be authorized by the Secretary;

children.label: D
children.text: any reserve fund established under subsection (b)(5) of this section and any administrative expenses incurred by the Secretary specified as reimbursable under this chapter.

Marketing and promotion plans and amendments to such plans prepared by a council under subsection (a)(1)(C) of this section shall be designed to increase the general demand for fish and fish products described in accordance with by encouraging, expanding, and improving the marketing, promotion and utilization of such fish and fish products, in domestic or foreign markets, or both, through consumer education, research, and other marketing and promotion activities.section 4009(b)(3) of this title

Consumer education and other marketing and promotion activities carried out by a council under a marketing and promotion plan and amendments to such plan may not contain references to any private brand or trade name and shall avoid the use of deceptive acts or practices in promoting fish or fish products or with respect to the quality, value, or use of any competing product or group of products.
sue and be sued;
enter into contracts;
employ and determine the salary of an executive director who may, with the approval of the council, employ and determine the salary of such additional staff as may be necessary;
collaborate with other councils and with the National Council in establishing and implementing a national marketing and promotion plan for one or more species of fish or fish products; and

establish a reserve fund from monies collected and received under to permit an effective and sustained program of research, consumer education, and other marketing and promotion activities regarding the quality and marketing of fish and fish products in years when production and assessment income may be reduced, but the total reserve fund may not exceed the amount budgeted for the current fiscal year of operation.section 4012 of this title

A council may develop and submit to the Secretary for approval, or upon the request of a council the Secretary shall develop, quality standards for a fish or fish product described in accordance with . Any quality standard developed under this paragraph shall be consistent with the purposes of this chapter.section 4009(b)(3) of this title

A quality standard developed under paragraph (1) of this subsection may be adopted by a council by a majority of the members of the council if first approved, in a referendum conducted by the council, by a majority of the sector participants of the sector concerned voting and the majority collectively accounted for, in the twelve-month period immediately preceding the month in which the referendum is held, not less than sixty-six percent of the value of the fish or fish products described in accordance with that were handled by that sector during such period.section 4009(b)(3) of this title

With respect to a quality standard adopted under paragraph (2) of this subsection, the council shall develop and file with the Secretary an official identification in the form of a symbol, stamp, label, or seal that will be used to indicate that a fish or fish product meets the quality standard at the time the official identification is affixed to the fish or fish product, or is affixed to or printed on the packaging material of the fish or fish product.

The Secretary shall establish by regulation procedures for the use of an official identification filed with the Secretary under paragraph (3) of this subsection. Misuse of an official identification established under this section shall constitute a violation of this chapter.

children.label: A
children.text: publish the proposed regulations by such means as will result in wide publicity in affected regions; and

children.label: B
children.text: provide for public comment and the opportunity for a public hearing.
A council may receive, investigate and report to the Secretary accounts of violations of regulations issued under paragraph (4) of this subsection.

Any regulation issued under paragraph (4) of this subsection shall be repealed immediately by the Secretary upon the termination under of the council that developed the official identification to which the regulations apply.section 4015 of this title
The procedures applicable to the adoption and the taking effect of a quality standard developed under this subsection also apply to a subsequent amendment or the termination of such standard.

children.heading: Amendment of a charter
children.label: d Amendment of a charter
children.text: A council may submit to the Secretary amendments to the text of the council’s charter. Any proposed amendments to a charter shall be approved or disapproved in the same manner as the original charter was approved under section 4009(d) and (e) of this title, with the exception of .section 4009(d)(1)(B) of this title
